race.comment: SECOND SWING (6) returns for the Cavanough yard and looks to have come back in terrific order, tightening up nicely through two handy hit-outs. He keeps the blinkers from his recent trial and draws to advantage for Bullock, who should have him in the right spot. Bold showing anticipated. THIRTY DEGREES (3) sets up well fourth-up after showing clear improvement in his past two runs. The draw is sticky, but the rise in trip suits and he's trending the right way. TOKE (8) also fourth-up and is a likely improver, though faces a tough task. WILLOW CAPRI (10) returns and has been readied with a soft trial. May sneak a minor spot.
